title: EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD - 211info
text: EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Electric and water service provider. Fields complaints and calls about utility emergencies. Provides a medical certificate program. May provide assistance or payment plans to customers who are having difficulty paying their utility bills. The Customer Care Program offers a $280 bill credit once per calendar year to eligible customers. 4200 Roosevelt Boulevard Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Electric and water customers: Unrestricted Customer Care Program: EWEB customers that meet income guidelines Hours: Customer Service by phone Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Report power outages and water emergencies 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 685-7000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 685-7000 Main phone Customer Service (541) 685-7000 Report Power Outages (844) 484-2300 Report Water Emergencies (541) 685-7595 Customer Service (800) 841-5871 Toll-free Text Short Code 893932 Text the word OUT Report Power Outages Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment or visit website for more information. Customer Care Program: Applications open on the first business day of each month at 8:30am, and funds are available on a first-come, first-served basis until capacity is reached. Apply online or over the phone. Application by mail available to senior and disabled customers ONLY with proof of SSI or SSDI benefits. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Current billing information and proof of income for utility assistance LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene, Leaburg, Springfield, Vida, and Walterville Services: Electric Service Connection/Repair Electric Service Payment Assistance Electric Service Providers Utility Service Complaints Water Service Connection/Repair Water Service Payment Assistance Water Service Providers Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - INCOME-BASED EFFICIENCY REBATES AND LOANS UTILITIES - PUBLIC SAFETY POWER SHUTOFFS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD
